transcript.text: This is the older vlog of April 16th, 2019.
It's 5.50 p.m. on Tuesday.
I'm still working on the same project as before, the mountains of Colorado.
There's so many.
But it's interesting, super interesting.
I feel like I'm in the mountains.
You know, I'm experiencing the mountains for what they are,
Seeing them in a way that you wouldn't, I guess, see them in person.
So it's keeping my interest where I would like to finish pretty soon, for sure.
And then I have to organize them by height.
And I can't always do that with Google Earth.
Google Earth doesn't always work.
Sometimes it has it not aligned.
So yesterday, what I was doing with reading was Plato Dialogues.
It's about 2,300 pages.
And I was doing The Laws yesterday, which I think is about 600 and something pages.
And that's a good thing to listen to if you just want to space out and listen to something without getting distracted.
I was listening to Tacitus yesterday, and I kept copying and pasting what they were saying,
Because the chapters were really little, and it just took forever.
I got about 20 chapters in.
I was thinking, okay, what the hell am I doing?
So with Plato, the chapters are really long, and you can hear him say interesting stuff,
But you don't feel like you have to copy and paste it.
But they do say interesting stuff all the time that I would definitely want to copy and paste later.
All their ideas about the laws and what they want to do with their country.
And they have it all designed, like what job you have for what position, how old you have to be.
And yeah, I'm definitely going to listen to that again and put in all the different information.
It's too complicated to talk about right now, but it's a great book to listen to if you want to do it over and over again.
I was just, I got up kind of late today.
I was up really late, and then I was working on my computer and talking to people.
So I haven't had the chance to get started with it yet today, but yeah, I'm going to do that.
I just wanted to do my vlog first.
So tomorrow, yeah, I don't know if we'll finish these mountains today, honestly.
So I might be in the same place, but yeah, I'm in a good position.
I like to look outside and see a nice sunny day, but not too sunny and bright.
You know, making me feel like pretty humy inside.
So I don't know why I'm yawning so much.
I'm not tired.
Anyways, that's enough talk for today.
Later.
